Our Story

Driving Excellence in Da Nang Since 2010

What started as a small local lot has grown into Da Nang's premier destination for high-quality pre-owned vehicles. For over a decade, we have been committed to transparency, integrity, and building lasting relationships with our community.

Our mission is simple: to provide a stress-free car buying experience where quality meets affordability. Every vehicle in our inventory undergoes a rigorous 150-point inspection to ensure your safety and satisfaction.

13+ Years Experience
5k+ Happy Customers
250+ Cars in Stock
verified

Certified Dealer

Industry Recognized

Our Journey

rocket_launch
Founded in Da Nang
2010
Opening our first showroom on Hai Phong Street with just 10 select vehicles.
trending_up
Reached 1,000 Sales
2015
Celebrated a major milestone of 1,000 families served across Central Vietnam.
storefront
Opened Second Branch
2019
Expanded our operations to a larger, state-of-the-art facility in Son Tra District.
workspace_premium
Voted Best Dealer
2023
Recognized as the "Best Pre-owned Car Dealer in Da Nang" by the local automotive guild.

Meet Our Leadership

The experts driving our commitment to quality service.

Nguyen Minh Tu

Founder & CEO

A veteran of the automotive industry with 20 years of expertise in luxury vehicle logistics.

Le Thuy Linh

General Manager

Ensuring every customer receives personalized service and leaves with their dream car.

Pham Hoang Nam

Sales Director

Expert in market analysis and vehicle valuation, ensuring fair pricing for every client.

Tran Thi Mai

Service Manager

Leading our technical team to maintain the highest standards of vehicle preparation.

Experience our collection of vehicles in person across Da Nang.
